## NumberRangeFacet interface

Number Range Facet is a trait for filtering results. It extends from [Facet](./x-types.facet.md)<!-- -->, changes the modelName and uses [NumberRangeFilter](./x-types.numberrangefilter.md) as filters.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export interface NumberRangeFacet extends Facet 
```
<b>Extends:</b> [Facet](./x-types.facet.md)

## Properties

|  Property | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  [filters](./x-types.numberrangefacet.filters.md) | [NumberRangeFilter](./x-types.numberrangefilter.md)<!-- -->\[\] | Filters available for the facet. |
|  [modelName](./x-types.numberrangefacet.modelname.md) | 'NumberRangeFacet' | Model name to indicate the facet type. |
